Test Case Title: Render Arabic RTL app shell
Test Case Description: Verify the application shell renders with Arabic-first RTL direction and primary navigation.
Preconditions: Application is reachable online.
Test Data: Arabic UI text; routes: /diary, /foods, /profile
Steps: 1. Open the app; 2. Inspect document direction and main layout; 3. Verify navigation labels and order.
Expected Result: The app uses RTL layout, Arabic labels remain readable, and navigation to Diary, Foods, and Profile is visible.
Validation Rule(s): Arabic RTL layout required.

Test Case Title: Redirect home route to Diary
Test Case Description: Verify root route sends the user to the Diary page as the v1 home screen.
Preconditions: Application is reachable online.
Test Data: Route: /
Steps: 1. Open /; 2. Wait for navigation; 3. Observe final route and page content.
Expected Result: The user lands on /diary or the Diary page without a broken intermediate state.
Validation Rule(s): Home route redirects to Diary.

Test Case Title: Allow protected API access with valid token
Test Case Description: Verify protected personal nutrition data APIs allow access when the configured bearer token is valid.
Preconditions: Backend is running with auth token configured.
Test Data: Authorization: Bearer valid-token
Steps: 1. Send request to a protected Profile, Foods, or Diary API with valid bearer token; 2. Observe response.
Expected Result: The API returns the requested resource or a valid empty state, not 401.
Validation Rule(s): Protected APIs require configured bearer token unless token is intentionally empty.

Test Case Title: Reject missing or invalid token
Test Case Description: Verify protected APIs reject requests without a valid bearer token and UI maps 401 to Arabic access/session error.
Preconditions: Backend is running with auth token configured.
Test Data: Missing token; invalid token
Steps: 1. Send protected API request without token; 2. Send protected API request with invalid token; 3. Open UI with invalid API auth if supported.
Expected Result: API returns 401; UI shows access/session error and does not expose personal nutrition data.
Validation Rule(s): 401 Unauthorized maps to Arabic access/session error.
Expected Error Message: تعذر الوصول. تحقق من صلاحية الدخول.

User Story Title: Use an Optional Installable Online Shell
Test Case Title: Verify manifest installable shell metadata without offline-data claim
Test Case Description: Verify the optional installable shell metadata is present only for app-shell behavior and does not promise offline personal nutrition data.
Preconditions: Application build artifacts or public manifest are available; v1 online-only scope is active.
Test Data: Manifest fields: name, short_name, start_url, display, icons; install prompt copy if exposed.
Steps: 1. Inspect manifest.webmanifest or configured manifest endpoint; 2. Verify name, short_name, start_url, display, and icons are present if installable shell is retained; 3. Trigger install prompt where supported; 4. Review all install prompt and shell copy.
Expected Result: Manifest supports optional shell metadata, but no visible copy promises offline Profile, Food, or Diary access or offline writes.
Platform / Viewport: iPhone Safari latest two iOS versions; Android Chrome latest two
Validation Rule(s): Installable shell may exist without offline personal data behavior.
Notes / Open Questions: Browser install prompt display is platform-controlled; automation should inspect manifest fields and keep prompt verification manual.

Test Case Title: Verify service worker static shell cache excludes personal API data
Test Case Description: Verify the service worker, if retained, caches static shell assets only and does not cache personal nutrition API responses as source of truth.
Preconditions: Service worker source or built service-worker file is available; app has Profile, Foods, and Diary API routes.
Test Data: API route patterns: profile, foods, diary, week, sync; static asset paths: JS, CSS, icons, manifest.
Steps: 1. Inspect service worker cache allowlist and runtime fetch handlers; 2. Confirm cache rules include static shell assets only; 3. Confirm personal API routes and sync routes are not cached for source-of-truth reads; 4. In browser, load app, go offline, and attempt a personal data read and write.
Expected Result: Service worker does not cache Profile, Foods, Diary, Week, or Sync responses as current personal data; offline personal reads show connection/read errors and writes are blocked with no queued mutation.
Platform / Viewport: Desktop Chrome; Android Chrome; iPhone Safari PWA
Validation Rule(s): Offline personal data cache and offline writes are out of v1 scope.
Expected Error Message: تعذر تحميل البيانات. تحقق من الاتصال وحاول مرة أخرى.; تعذر الاتصال بالخادم. لم يتم حفظ التغييرات.
Source / Evidence: docs/ba/07_USER_STORIES.md US-SHELL-SCOPE-001; US-FUTURE-OFFLINE-001; docs/ba/13_PRODUCT_DECISIONS.md D-001 D-002
Notes / Open Questions: Separated from offline page UX; this case is specifically about cache rules and personal API source-of-truth behavior.

Test Case Title: Health endpoint returns online status
Test Case Description: Verify the health endpoint supports online-only availability checks.
Preconditions: Backend is running.
Test Data: GET /health or configured health route
Steps: 1. Call the health endpoint; 2. Inspect status and payload.
Expected Result: The endpoint returns a successful status and health payload suitable for connectivity triage.
Validation Rule(s): Health endpoint should respond when backend is reachable.

Test Case Title: Secrets and API configuration are not exposed in committed files
Test Case Description: Verify required config uses environment values and committed examples do not include real secrets.
Preconditions: Repository files are available for inspection.
Test Data: .env; .env.local; .env.example; API token; database URL
Steps: 1. Inspect tracked files; 2. Confirm real secret files are ignored; 3. Confirm examples use placeholders; 4. Confirm frontend API URL uses safe config pattern.
Expected Result: No real secrets, tokens, passwords, private keys, or local credential files are committed; API access relies on configured environment values.
Validation Rule(s): Secrets must not be committed.
Notes / Open Questions: Manual repo review required before release.

User Story Title: Use Single Profile Scope in v1
Test Case Title: Do not show multi-profile switching in v1
Test Case Description: Verify v1 uses one personal Profile and does not require People/Profile switching.
Preconditions: App is reachable online.
Test Data: Profile page; navigation
Steps: 1. Open Profile page; 2. Inspect for person switcher or multi-profile controls; 3. Navigate Diary and Foods.
Expected Result: The app presents one personal profile scope; no v1 story requires multiple people or person-specific food catalogs.
Validation Rule(s): Multi-profile is Future Scope.

User Story Title: Save Profile Stats and Goal Online
Test Case Title: Save valid profile after successful API response
Test Case Description: Verify a valid profile can be saved online and success is only shown after API success.
Preconditions: Backend reachable; Profile page open.
Test Data: birth_date valid age 30; height 175; weight 80; activity moderate; goal cut; protein_per_kg 1.8; fat_pct 0.25
Steps: 1. Fill valid profile fields; 2. Submit once; 3. Wait for API response; 4. Reload profile.
Expected Result: Profile saves after successful response, input persists on reload, and no local-only saved state is shown before success.
Field(s): birth_date; height_cm; weight_kg; activity_level; goal; protein_per_kg; fat_pct
Validation Rule(s): Profile writes succeed only after successful API response.

User Story Title: Save Profile Stats and Goal Online
Test Case Title: Profile write failure preserves input and does not queue
Test Case Description: Verify failed profile save does not create offline queue or saved-later message.
Preconditions: Backend API is unreachable or request is forced to timeout.
Test Data: Valid profile input
Steps: 1. Fill valid profile fields; 2. Simulate network/API write failure; 3. Submit; 4. Reconnect and inspect state.
Expected Result: UI shows connection/server error, visible input is preserved, no local queued write is created, and data is saved only after explicit successful retry.
Validation Rule(s): No failed writes are queued or saved locally.
Expected Error Message: تعذر الاتصال بالخادم. لم يتم حفظ التغييرات.
Source / Evidence: docs/ba/07_USER_STORIES.md US-PROFILE-HAPPY-001; US-NETWORK-WRITE-001; docs/ba/13_PRODUCT_DECISIONS.md D-001 D-013

Test Case Title: Show missing profile prompt when no profile exists
Test Case Description: Verify first-time user sees an actionable missing profile state.
Preconditions: Backend reachable; no Profile row exists.
Test Data: No profile data
Steps: 1. Open Profile page; 2. Observe state; 3. Open Diary target area if applicable.
Expected Result: UI tells the user to enter profile data to calculate daily targets and does not show misleading target values.
Validation Rule(s): Missing profile state must be clear and actionable.

Test Case Title: Show exact Profile load failure message
Test Case Description: Verify Profile load failures use the approved Arabic copy and do not fall back to stale personal data as source of truth.
Preconditions: Backend profile API unreachable.
Test Data: GET profile fails with network error or 5xx
Steps: 1. Open Profile page while API is unavailable; 2. Observe message; 3. Check retry behavior if available.
Expected Result: UI shows the exact Profile read-failure copy, keeps data clearly unavailable, and does not treat cached profile as fresh source of truth.
Validation Rule(s): Profile load failure uses exact Arabic read-failure copy.
Expected Error Message: تعذر تحميل الملف الشخصي. تحقق من الاتصال وحاول مرة أخرى.

Test Case Title: Reject future birth date
Test Case Description: Verify future birth date is blocked with field-level Arabic validation.
Preconditions: Profile form is open.
Test Data: birth_date tomorrow
Steps: 1. Enter a future birth date; 2. Submit profile.
Expected Result: Submit is blocked or API returns 422 mapped to the field; error is shown near birth date; invalid data is not saved.
Validation Rule(s): Birth date cannot be in the future.
Expected Error Message: تاريخ الميلاد لا يمكن أن يكون في المستقبل.

Test Case Title: Reject age outside 10 to 100 years
Test Case Description: Verify profile age lower and upper bounds are enforced.
Preconditions: Profile form is open.
Test Data: birth_date resulting in age 9; birth_date resulting in age 101
Steps: 1. Enter birth date for age 9; 2. Submit; 3. Enter birth date for age 101; 4. Submit.
Expected Result: Both invalid ages are rejected with the correct Arabic field-level error messages and no profile update occurs.
Validation Rule(s): Age must be 10-100 years.
Expected Error Message: العمر يجب أن يكون 10 سنوات أو أكثر.; العمر يجب ألا يتجاوز 100 سنة.

Test Case Title: Validate profile numeric ranges
Test Case Description: Verify height, weight, protein per kg, and fat percentage v1 ranges.
Preconditions: Profile form is open.
Test Data: height 99 and 251; weight 19 and 301; protein 0.9 and 3.1; fat_pct 0.14 and 0.41
Steps: 1. Enter each below-min value and submit; 2. Enter each above-max value and submit; 3. Enter valid boundary values.
Expected Result: Invalid values show below/above max Arabic errors; valid boundary values are accepted when all other fields are valid.
Validation Rule(s): Height 100-250; weight 20-300; protein/kg 1.0-3.0; fat_pct 15%-40%.
Expected Error Message: القيمة أقل من الحد المسموح.; القيمة أعلى من الحد المسموح.

Test Case Title: Calculate and preview targets for valid profile
Test Case Description: Verify BMR/TDEE/goal/macros preview updates from valid profile inputs.
Preconditions: Profile form is open.
Test Data: male; age 30; 175 cm; 80 kg; moderate; cut; protein 1.8; fat 0.25
Steps: 1. Enter valid profile data; 2. Observe target preview; 3. Compare calories and macros with formula tolerance.
Expected Result: Preview shows calculated calories, protein, carbs, and fat based on Mifflin-St Jeor and configured macro rules.
Validation Rule(s): Targets are computed from valid current profile inputs.

Test Case Title: Do not present invalid target preview as savable
Test Case Description: Verify invalid profile inputs do not produce a misleading valid target state.
Preconditions: Profile form is open.
Test Data: height 50; protein_per_kg 9
Steps: 1. Enter invalid profile values; 2. Observe preview and submit controls.
Expected Result: UI shows validation errors and does not present the calculated targets as reliable saved targets until inputs are valid.
Validation Rule(s): Invalid profile inputs must be visibly invalid before save.
Expected Error Message: القيمة أقل من الحد المسموح.; القيمة أعلى من الحد المسموح.

Test Case Title: Clamp negative carb calories and expose carb_clamped flag
Test Case Description: Verify very low calorie or high protein configuration does not produce negative carb grams silently.
Preconditions: Profile target inputs create negative carb_cal scenario.
Test Data: Target calculation fixture where protein calories and fat calories exceed target calories, producing negative carb_cal.
Steps: 1. Call the calc engine or target preview endpoint with a fixture that produces negative carb_cal; 2. Inspect returned macro values; 3. Inspect target preview UI if the fixture is reproducible through valid UI inputs.
Expected Result: Returned carb_g is 0 and carb_clamped is true; UI does not show negative carb grams.
Validation Rule(s): Negative carb calories clamp to 0 with flag.
Notes / Open Questions: BA acceptance criteria names carb_clamped; if the implementation uses another field, update the API contract before automation.

Test Case Title: Display active food cards with summary nutrients
Test Case Description: Verify Foods page lists only active foods and shows required summary information.
Preconditions: Backend has at least two active foods and one archived food.
Test Data: Active food: Rice, serving plate, calories 200, protein 4, carbs 44, fat 1, fiber 1; Archived food: Old Snack
Steps: 1. Open Foods page; 2. Wait for list to load; 3. Inspect each visible food card.
Expected Result: Only active foods are visible; cards show name, serving label, calories, protein, carbs, fat, and net carbs where applicable.
Field(s): name; serving_label; calories; protein_g; carb_g; fat_g; fiber_g
Validation Rule(s): Archived foods are hidden; net carbs are computed as carbs minus fiber.

Test Case Title: Archived foods are hidden from active list and future selection
Test Case Description: Verify archived foods do not appear in active Foods list or Diary food picker.
Preconditions: Food exists with is_active false and archived_at timestamp.
Test Data: Archived food with previous diary entries
Steps: 1. Open Foods page; 2. Search archived food name; 3. Open Diary add-entry food picker.
Expected Result: Archived food is not visible in active list, search results, or future Diary selection; old diary entries remain visible from snapshots.
Validation Rule(s): Archived foods are hidden from active list and future selection.
Source / Evidence: docs/ba/07_USER_STORIES.md US-FOOD-HAPPY-001; US-FOOD-CRUD-003; docs/ba/13_PRODUCT_DECISIONS.md D-003 D-004

Test Case Title: Search active foods by name
Test Case Description: Verify searching filters active food list by food name.
Preconditions: Backend has active foods with Arabic and English names.
Test Data: Search term: رز; search term: rice
Steps: 1. Open Foods page; 2. Enter Arabic search term; 3. Observe results; 4. Enter English search term; 5. Observe results.
Expected Result: Matching active foods are shown; non-matching active foods are hidden; archived foods remain hidden.
Validation Rule(s): Search applies to active foods by name.

Test Case Title: Show no-results message for unmatched search
Test Case Description: Verify no-results state appears for search with no active matches.
Preconditions: Backend has active foods but none match query.
Test Data: Search query: zzz-no-match
Steps: 1. Open Foods page; 2. Search for unmatched query.
Expected Result: UI shows no-results state and does not show empty-catalog copy or stale previous results.
Validation Rule(s): No-results state required for search with no matching results.

User Story Title: Show Food Loading, Empty, No-Results, and Error States
Test Case Title: Show loading and empty catalog states
Test Case Description: Verify Foods page has distinct loading and empty states with add-food action.
Preconditions: Backend reachable; catalog can be empty.
Test Data: No foods in active catalog
Steps: 1. Open Foods page with slow API; 2. Observe loading state; 3. Let empty response return.
Expected Result: Loading copy appears while fetch is pending; empty catalog copy appears after successful empty response with an add-food action.
Validation Rule(s): Loading and empty states must be distinct.
Expected Error Message: جاري تحميل الأطعمة.; لا توجد أطعمة بعد. أضف أول طعام للبدء.

Test Case Title: Show exact Foods list load failure message
Test Case Description: Verify Foods list read failure uses approved Arabic copy and does not show cached data as fresh.
Preconditions: Foods API is unreachable or forced to fail.
Test Data: GET foods returns network error or 5xx
Steps: 1. Open Foods page; 2. Trigger foods list read failure; 3. Observe page state.
Expected Result: UI shows exact Foods list load failure message and provides recovery behavior without saving or queuing changes.
Validation Rule(s): Foods list load failure uses exact Arabic copy.
Expected Error Message: تعذر تحميل قائمة الأطعمة. تحقق من الاتصال وحاول مرة أخرى.

Test Case Title: Create valid active food
Test Case Description: Verify a user can create a food with required serving and core nutrients.
Preconditions: Backend reachable; Foods page open.
Test Data: name تمر; serving_label 3 حبات; serving_grams 30; calories 85; protein 1; carbs 22; fat 0; fiber 2; sugar 18
Steps: 1. Open add food form; 2. Fill valid required and optional fields; 3. Submit once; 4. Wait for API success; 5. Verify food appears in list.
Expected Result: Food is created as active after successful API response and appears in active Foods list with correct summary values.
Field(s): name; serving_label; serving_grams; calories; protein_g; carb_g; fat_g; fiber_g; total_sugars_g
Validation Rule(s): Required food fields must be valid; write succeeds only after API response.

Test Case Title: Create food with optional detail nutrients omitted
Test Case Description: Verify optional detail nutrients can be left blank without blocking food creation.
Preconditions: Backend reachable; Foods page open.
Test Data: Required fields valid; saturated_fat_g blank; trans_fat_g blank; cholesterol_mg blank; sodium_mg blank; notes blank if present
Steps: 1. Open add food form; 2. Fill required fields only; 3. Leave optional detail fields blank; 4. Submit.
Expected Result: Food is saved; optional values are stored as null/omitted according to API contract and do not display as invalid.
Validation Rule(s): Optional fields may be blank unless a value is entered.

User Story Title: Handle API Write Failures Without Local Persistence
Test Case Title: Food create failure does not save locally or queue
Test Case Description: Verify failed food create preserves input but does not show saved locally or will sync later.
Preconditions: Foods API write fails with network error or timeout.
Test Data: Valid food input
Steps: 1. Fill add food form; 2. Submit while API is unreachable; 3. Observe UI; 4. Restore network and inspect list.
Expected Result: UI shows write connection error, preserves visible input, does not add food to active list, and creates no offline queued write.
Validation Rule(s): Failed writes must not be queued or saved locally.
Expected Error Message: تعذر الاتصال بالخادم. لم يتم حفظ التغييرات.

Test Case Title: Reject missing required food fields
Test Case Description: Verify add/edit food form marks required fields with Arabic field errors.
Preconditions: Food form is open.
Test Data: All fields empty; name blank; serving_label blank; calories blank; protein blank; carbs blank; fat blank
Steps: 1. Open add food form; 2. Submit without filling fields.
Expected Result: Required fields show field-level Arabic errors; form does not submit; focus moves to first invalid field if required by a11y criteria.
Field(s): name; serving_label; calories; protein_g; carb_g; fat_g
Validation Rule(s): Required fields cannot be empty.

Test Case Title: Reject invalid or out-of-range food numbers
Test Case Description: Verify numeric food nutrient ranges are enforced.
Preconditions: Food form is open.
Test Data: calories -1 and 3001; protein -1 and 301; carbs -1 and 501; fat -1 and 301; sodium 10001; cholesterol 2001; invalid text abc
Steps: 1. Enter each invalid value; 2. Submit; 3. Enter valid boundary values.
Expected Result: Invalid numbers, negative values, and values above max show field-level Arabic errors; valid boundary values are accepted.
Field(s): calories; protein_g; carb_g; fat_g; sodium_mg; cholesterol_mg
Validation Rule(s): Food per-serving max ranges and non-negative values required.
Expected Error Message: أدخل رقمًا صحيحًا.; القيمة أقل من الحد المسموح.; القيمة أعلى من الحد المسموح.

Test Case Title: Validate serving_grams field and label
Test Case Description: Verify serving grams uses API field serving_grams and product label Serving weight in grams / وزن الحصة بالجرام.
Preconditions: Food form is open.
Test Data: serving_grams blank; 0; 1; 2000; 2001
Steps: 1. Inspect label; 2. Submit with blank serving_grams; 3. Submit with 0; 4. Submit with 1 and 2000; 5. Submit with 2001.
Expected Result: Blank is allowed when gram logging should be disabled for that food; 0 and 2001 are rejected; 1 and 2000 are accepted.
Validation Rule(s): Serving grams optional; if present, must be 1-2000g.
Expected Error Message: القيمة أقل من الحد المسموح.; القيمة أعلى من الحد المسموح.

Test Case Title: Reject fiber greater than carbs
Test Case Description: Verify food cannot be saved when fiber_g exceeds carb_g because net carbs would be negative.
Preconditions: Food form is open.
Test Data: carb_g 5; fiber_g 6
Steps: 1. Enter valid required food fields; 2. Set carbs to 5 and fiber to 6; 3. Submit.
Expected Result: Save is blocked or API returns 422 mapped to fiber/carbs; Arabic field error appears; net carbs are never negative.
Validation Rule(s): fiber_g must not exceed carb_g.
Expected Error Message: الألياف لا يمكن أن تكون أكبر من الكربوهيدرات.

Test Case Title: Block exact active duplicate food
Test Case Description: Verify duplicate detection normalizes name, serving label, and serving grams for active foods.
Preconditions: Active food exists.
Test Data: Existing active: name 'Rice  Bowl', serving_label 'Plate', serving_grams 250; New: name 'rice bowl', serving_label ' Plate ', serving_grams 250
Steps: 1. Open add food form; 2. Enter duplicate values with different English case and extra spaces; 3. Submit.
Expected Result: System blocks save with clear Arabic duplicate message and does not create a second active duplicate.
Validation Rule(s): Active duplicate key is normalized name + serving_label + serving_grams when present.
Expected Error Message: هذا الطعام موجود مسبقًا بنفس الحصة.

Test Case Title: Allow duplicate key when existing food is archived
Test Case Description: Verify archived foods do not block duplicate creation.
Preconditions: Archived food exists with same duplicate key; no active duplicate exists.
Test Data: Archived: name رز; serving_label طبق; serving_grams 250; New same values
Steps: 1. Open add food form; 2. Enter values matching archived food; 3. Submit.
Expected Result: New active food is allowed because archived foods do not block duplicate creation.
Validation Rule(s): Duplicate blocking applies only to active foods.

Test Case Title: Edit active food fields
Test Case Description: Verify active food can be edited and list/details reflect updated values after API success.
Preconditions: Active food exists and is not archived.
Test Data: Food id A; update calories from 100 to 120; name unchanged
Steps: 1. Open Foods page; 2. Open edit for active food; 3. Change valid field; 4. Submit once; 5. Verify updated list/detail.
Expected Result: Food updates only after successful API response; visible data reflects saved response; no historical diary snapshots are recalculated.
Validation Rule(s): Edited values must pass same create validation and duplicate rules.

Test Case Title: Editing used food does not change old diary entries
Test Case Description: Verify diary entries keep original nutrition snapshot after catalog food edit.
Preconditions: Food has existing diary entry snapshot.
Test Data: Food original calories 100; diary entry quantity 2; edit food calories to 150
Steps: 1. Create/log diary entry using food; 2. Edit catalog food nutrition; 3. Reopen diary day and weekly summary.
Expected Result: Old diary entry totals remain based on original snapshot; future logs use edited catalog values.
Validation Rule(s): Diary snapshots preserve historical nutrition.

Test Case Title: Archive food through accessible confirmation dialog
Test Case Description: Verify delete action opens confirmation dialog explaining archive behavior and naming the food.
Preconditions: Active food exists.
Test Data: Food name: تمر
Steps: 1. Click delete/archive action; 2. Inspect dialog title/body; 3. Confirm.
Expected Result: Dialog shows the food name, explains it will be archived and hidden from future selection, and confirm archives food after API success.
Validation Rule(s): Delete requires confirmation and archives instead of hard delete.

Test Case Title: Cancel archive makes no changes
Test Case Description: Verify canceling delete confirmation leaves the food active and visible.
Preconditions: Active food exists.
Test Data: Food name: تمر
Steps: 1. Click delete/archive; 2. Click Cancel; 3. Reopen Foods list; 4. Search food.
Expected Result: Food remains active and visible; no API archive mutation is committed.
Validation Rule(s): Cancel makes no changes.

Test Case Title: Archive sets is_active false and archived_at timestamp
Test Case Description: Verify confirmed archive stores lifecycle fields and hides food from active surfaces.
Preconditions: Active food exists.
Test Data: Food id A
Steps: 1. Confirm archive; 2. Inspect API/database response if accessible; 3. Refresh Foods list; 4. Open Diary food picker.
Expected Result: Food has is_active=false and archived_at timestamp; it disappears from active Foods list and Diary selection.
Validation Rule(s): No hard delete in v1; archive fields required.

User Story Title: Handle API Write Failures Without Local Persistence
Test Case Title: Archive failure leaves food active
Test Case Description: Verify failed archive does not hide the food locally or queue archive.
Preconditions: Active food exists; archive API fails.
Test Data: Food id A
Steps: 1. Open archive dialog; 2. Confirm while API fails; 3. Observe list; 4. Retry after restoring API.
Expected Result: UI shows write error; food remains active and visible until a successful archive response; no queued archive is created.
Validation Rule(s): Failed writes must not be queued or applied locally as source of truth.
Expected Error Message: تعذر الاتصال بالخادم. لم يتم حفظ التغييرات.

User Story Title: Handle Stale Food During Edit, Archive, or Diary Logging
Test Case Title: Reject editing or archiving stale food
Test Case Description: Verify user gets stale item error if food is archived/deleted elsewhere before submit.
Preconditions: Food edit form or archive dialog is open; another session archives same food.
Test Data: Food id A
Steps: 1. Open food edit form; 2. In another client archive the same food; 3. Submit edit or confirm archive; 4. Observe error.
Expected Result: Operation is rejected; UI shows stale food error; list refresh is required; no local mutation is treated as saved.
Validation Rule(s): Stale food changes must be rejected with clear Arabic error.
Expected Error Message: هذا الطعام لم يعد متاحًا. حدّث القائمة وحاول مرة أخرى.

User Story Title: Handle Stale Food During Edit, Archive, or Diary Logging
Test Case Title: Reject diary submit if selected food changed before submit
Test Case Description: Verify diary logging detects selected food changed before submit when required by BA stale criteria.
Preconditions: Diary add form open with selected food; same food changes before submit.
Test Data: Selected food id A; API returns stale/change conflict
Steps: 1. Select active food in Diary; 2. Modify the same food in another client; 3. Submit diary entry; 4. Observe response.
Expected Result: Diary entry is not saved from stale data; UI shows approved food-changed Arabic message and asks user to refresh.
Validation Rule(s): Changed food before submit must be detected and rejected where API signals stale data.
Expected Error Message: تم تغيير بيانات الطعام قبل الحفظ. حدّث البيانات وحاول مرة أخرى.
Notes / Open Questions: Exact stale detection mechanism is implementation-dependent.

Test Case Title: View full food details and optional nutrients
Test Case Description: Verify food detail view shows full name, serving metadata, core nutrients, and optional nutrients when present.
Preconditions: Active food exists with optional nutrients.
Test Data: Long mixed Arabic/English name; serving_grams 100; sodium 500; cholesterol 20
Steps: 1. Open Foods page; 2. Open food details; 3. Inspect fields.
Expected Result: Detail view shows full food name without two-line truncation, serving info, core nutrients, optional nutrients when available, and no misleading values for missing optional fields.
Field(s): name; serving_label; serving_grams; optional nutrient fields
Validation Rule(s): Details show full name and available nutrition data.

Test Case Title: Show exact Food detail load failure message
Test Case Description: Verify food detail load failure uses approved Arabic copy.
Preconditions: Food detail API/read is unavailable.
Test Data: Food id A detail request fails
Steps: 1. Open food detail view; 2. Simulate detail read failure.
Expected Result: UI shows exact Food detail failure copy and does not show stale details as fresh.
Validation Rule(s): Food detail load failure uses exact Arabic copy.
Expected Error Message: تعذر تحميل تفاصيل الطعام. تحقق من الاتصال وحاول مرة أخرى.

Test Case Title: Display diary entries and daily totals for selected date
Test Case Description: Verify selected day shows logged foods, quantities, totals, and target comparison.
Preconditions: Profile exists; diary entries exist for selected date.
Test Data: Date today; entry Rice quantity 1.5 servings
Steps: 1. Open Diary page; 2. Select date with entries; 3. Inspect entry list and totals.
Expected Result: Diary shows entries for selected date only, daily consumed totals, target comparison, and no entries from other dates.
Validation Rule(s): Diary reads selected day from backend online API.

Test Case Title: Show exact Diary day load failure message
Test Case Description: Verify Diary day read failure uses approved Arabic copy.
Preconditions: Diary API unavailable.
Test Data: GET diary day fails
Steps: 1. Open Diary page; 2. Trigger day read failure.
Expected Result: UI shows exact Diary day failure copy and does not treat cached data as current.
Validation Rule(s): Diary day load failure uses exact Arabic copy.
Expected Error Message: تعذر تحميل يوميات هذا اليوم. تحقق من الاتصال وحاول مرة أخرى.

Test Case Title: Add diary entry using servings mode
Test Case Description: Verify servings-mode entry uses final request payload and stores calculated snapshot.
Preconditions: Profile exists; active food exists.
Test Data: Payload: entry_date today; food_id A; log_mode servings; quantity 1.5
Steps: 1. Open Diary add entry; 2. Select active food; 3. Choose servings mode; 4. Enter 1.5; 5. Submit.
Expected Result: API request uses log_mode=servings and quantity=1.5 servings; entry saves after success; totals update from snapshot.
Validation Rule(s): Serving quantity must be 0.01-50; snapshot freezes calculated totals.

Test Case Title: Validate serving quantity bounds
Test Case Description: Verify serving quantity below 0.01 and above 50 is rejected.
Preconditions: Diary add/edit form open in servings mode.
Steps: 1. Enter below-min quantity and submit; 2. Enter above-max quantity and submit; 3. Enter boundary values and submit with valid food/date.
Expected Result: Below-min and above-max values show Arabic field errors; valid boundaries are accepted.
Validation Rule(s): Serving quantity range is 0.01-50.
Expected Error Message: القيمة أقل من الحد المسموح.; القيمة أعلى من الحد المسموح.

Test Case Title: Add diary entry using grams mode
Test Case Description: Verify gram-mode entry is allowed only when serving_grams exists and calculates proportional nutrition.
Preconditions: Profile exists; active food has serving_grams 100 and per-serving calories 250.
Test Data: Payload: entry_date today; food_id A; log_mode grams; quantity 150
Steps: 1. Open Diary add entry; 2. Select food with serving_grams; 3. Choose grams mode; 4. Enter 150; 5. Submit.
Expected Result: Entry saves after API success; serving_multiplier is 1.5; calculated totals are 1.5 times per-serving snapshot values.
Field(s): entry_date; food_id; log_mode; quantity; serving_grams; nutrition_snapshot
Validation Rule(s): Gram mode requires serving_grams; gram quantity 1-5000; nutrition is proportional.
Source / Evidence: docs/ba/07_USER_STORIES.md US-DIARY-GRAM-001; US-DIARY-GRAM-CONTRACT-001; docs/ba/13_PRODUCT_DECISIONS.md D-007 D-021

Test Case Title: Disable or reject grams mode when serving_grams is missing
Test Case Description: Verify foods without serving_grams cannot be logged by grams.
Preconditions: Active food exists with serving_grams null.
Test Data: Food id B; log_mode grams; quantity 100
Steps: 1. Select food without serving_grams in Diary; 2. Inspect grams mode control; 3. Attempt gram logging if control remains reachable.
Expected Result: Gram mode is disabled or submit is rejected with clear Arabic error; no diary entry is saved.
Validation Rule(s): Gram mode requires selected food serving_grams.
Expected Error Message: لا يمكن التسجيل بالجرام لأن وزن الحصة غير محدد لهذا الطعام.

User Story Title: Use Final Diary Quantity Mode Contract
Test Case Title: Persist final diary snapshot contract
Test Case Description: Verify API/storage contract stores log mode, logged quantity, per-serving values, serving multiplier, and calculated totals.
Preconditions: Backend reachable; active food available.
Test Data: Create servings entry and grams entry
Steps: 1. Create servings entry; 2. Create grams entry; 3. Inspect API response or database; 4. Compare calculated_totals.
Expected Result: Each entry snapshot includes food identity, log_mode, logged_quantity, per-serving values, serving_multiplier, and calculated_totals. Quantity meaning follows log_mode.
Validation Rule(s): Final Diary API/storage contract must be exact and testable.

User Story Title: Use Final Diary Quantity Mode Contract
Test Case Title: Aggregate from snapshot calculated totals, not current catalog food
Test Case Description: Verify daily/weekly totals use frozen snapshot totals for both serving and gram entries.
Preconditions: Diary entries exist; catalog food is edited later.
Test Data: Entry snapshot calories 100; current food calories 999
Steps: 1. Create entry; 2. Edit food nutrition; 3. View day and weekly summary.
Expected Result: Totals remain based on snapshot calculated_totals and do not change with catalog edits.
Validation Rule(s): Aggregations use diary snapshot calculated totals.
Source / Evidence: docs/ba/07_USER_STORIES.md US-DIARY-GRAM-CONTRACT-001; US-DIARY-INTEGRITY-001; docs/ba/01_FEATURE_MAP.md F-034 F-035

Test Case Title: Block future diary dates
Test Case Description: Verify user cannot create or edit diary entries for future dates.
Preconditions: Diary add form open.
Test Data: entry_date tomorrow
Steps: 1. Select a future date; 2. Attempt to add an entry; 3. Attempt edit if future entry is reachable via API.
Expected Result: UI/API rejects future date and shows Arabic field-level error; no entry is saved or updated.
Validation Rule(s): Future diary dates are not allowed in v1.
Expected Error Message: لا يمكن تسجيل يوميات بتاريخ مستقبلي.

Test Case Title: Show no-foods guidance before logging meals
Test Case Description: Verify diary add flow handles empty active food catalog.
Preconditions: Profile exists; active Foods list is empty.
Test Data: No active foods
Steps: 1. Open Diary page; 2. Attempt to add an entry.
Expected Result: UI shows guidance to add food first and does not allow an entry without food_id.
Validation Rule(s): Diary entry requires active selected food.
Expected Error Message: أضف طعامًا أولًا قبل تسجيل الوجبات.

Test Case Title: Edit serving-mode diary quantity only
Test Case Description: Verify v1 edit allows only original mode quantity change for serving entries.
Preconditions: Existing serving-mode diary entry.
Test Data: Original log_mode servings; quantity 1; new quantity 2
Steps: 1. Open diary entry edit; 2. Verify food/date/log_mode/snapshot fields are not editable; 3. Change quantity to 2; 4. Submit.
Expected Result: Only quantity is updated after API success; food, date, log_mode, and per-serving snapshot remain unchanged; totals update.
Validation Rule(s): Edit only mode-specific quantity; food/date/log_mode/snapshot immutable.

Test Case Title: Edit gram-mode diary quantity only
Test Case Description: Verify gram-based entries can edit grams quantity within range without changing mode.
Preconditions: Existing gram-mode diary entry.
Test Data: Original log_mode grams; quantity 150; new quantity 200
Steps: 1. Open gram entry edit; 2. Confirm mode is grams and not editable; 3. Change quantity to 200; 4. Submit.
Expected Result: Updated entry keeps log_mode=grams, recalculates calculated_totals from frozen per-serving snapshot and serving_grams, and updates totals after API success.
Validation Rule(s): Gram edit changes grams quantity only; range 1-5000.

User Story Title: Handle API Write Failures Without Local Persistence
Test Case Title: Diary edit failure does not change entry locally
Test Case Description: Verify failed quantity edit preserves input but does not update diary totals as saved.
Preconditions: Existing diary entry; API update fails.
Test Data: New quantity valid
Steps: 1. Open edit; 2. Change quantity; 3. Submit while API fails; 4. Reopen diary day.
Expected Result: UI shows write error; entry and totals remain unchanged as saved data; no offline edit is queued.
Validation Rule(s): Failed writes must not be queued or treated as saved.
Expected Error Message: تعذر الاتصال بالخادم. لم يتم حفظ التغييرات.

Test Case Title: Archived food does not alter existing diary entries
Test Case Description: Verify archived catalog food keeps old diary entries readable and nutritionally unchanged.
Preconditions: Diary entry exists for a food that is later archived.
Test Data: Food id A; diary entry date yesterday
Steps: 1. Log diary entry; 2. Archive the food; 3. Reopen diary date; 4. View weekly summary.
Expected Result: Existing diary entry remains visible with food name and snapshot nutrition; day/week totals are unchanged; archived food is unavailable for future selection.
Validation Rule(s): Existing diary entries remain unchanged because they use snapshots.

Test Case Title: Delete diary entry with confirmation
Test Case Description: Verify delete action opens confirmation with food name and date, then deletes after API success.
Preconditions: Existing diary entry.
Test Data: Food name Rice; date today
Steps: 1. Click delete on diary entry; 2. Inspect confirmation dialog; 3. Confirm.
Expected Result: Dialog shows food name and date; confirmed delete succeeds only after API response; entry disappears and daily/weekly totals update.
Validation Rule(s): Diary delete requires simple confirmation and online success.

Test Case Title: Cancel diary delete makes no changes
Test Case Description: Verify canceling the delete dialog leaves diary entry and totals unchanged.
Preconditions: Existing diary entry.
Test Data: Food name Rice; date today
Steps: 1. Click delete; 2. Click Cancel or press Escape; 3. Inspect entry list and totals.
Expected Result: No delete request is committed; entry remains visible; daily and weekly totals remain unchanged.
Validation Rule(s): Cancel makes no change.

Test Case Title: Diary delete failure does not remove entry locally
Test Case Description: Verify failed delete preserves entry and totals and does not queue deletion.
Preconditions: Existing diary entry; delete API fails.
Test Data: Entry id A
Steps: 1. Open delete dialog; 2. Confirm while API fails; 3. Observe UI and reload day.
Expected Result: UI shows write error; entry remains after reload; no offline/local delete is queued.
Validation Rule(s): Failed writes must not be queued or applied locally.
Expected Error Message: تعذر الاتصال بالخادم. لم يتم حفظ التغييرات.

Test Case Title: Reject stale diary entry edit or delete
Test Case Description: Verify user sees stale diary message when entry was already deleted elsewhere.
Preconditions: Diary entry visible in one client; deleted in another client.
Test Data: Entry id A
Steps: 1. Open edit or delete for entry; 2. Delete same entry in another client; 3. Submit edit or confirm delete.
Expected Result: Operation is rejected with stale diary error; UI asks user to refresh; totals are not locally mutated as saved.
Validation Rule(s): Stale diary entries must be handled clearly.
Expected Error Message: هذا السجل لم يعد متاحًا. حدّث اليوميات وحاول مرة أخرى.

Test Case Title: Show Sunday-to-Saturday weekly summary
Test Case Description: Verify weekly summary aggregates one selected week from Sunday through Saturday.
Preconditions: Profile exists; diary entries across a week.
Test Data: Entries on Sunday, Wednesday, Saturday
Steps: 1. Open Diary weekly summary; 2. Select week containing test data; 3. Inspect seven-day layout and totals.
Expected Result: Week shows Sunday through Saturday in order, includes matching entries only, and compares consumed totals to targets.
Validation Rule(s): Weekly summary is a query/aggregation, not stored week entity.

Test Case Title: Weekly summary shows zero totals for days without entries
Test Case Description: Verify days with no diary entries show empty/zero state without errors.
Preconditions: Profile exists; selected week has no entries.
Test Data: Empty week
Steps: 1. Open week selector; 2. Select empty week; 3. Inspect all days.
Expected Result: Each day displays zero or empty consumed totals consistently and target comparison remains available if profile exists.
Validation Rule(s): Empty weekly data must be readable.

Test Case Title: Show exact weekly summary load failure message
Test Case Description: Verify weekly summary read failure uses approved Arabic copy.
Preconditions: Weekly summary API unavailable.
Test Data: GET weekly summary fails
Steps: 1. Open Diary weekly summary; 2. Trigger read failure.
Expected Result: UI shows exact weekly summary failure copy and does not treat cached weekly totals as current.
Validation Rule(s): Weekly summary read failure uses exact Arabic copy.
Expected Error Message: تعذر تحميل ملخص الأسبوع. تحقق من الاتصال وحاول مرة أخرى.

Test Case Title: Read failures use connection error and no offline source of truth
Test Case Description: Verify Profile, Foods, Diary, and Week reads all fail clearly when backend is unreachable.
Preconditions: Backend unreachable; browser may have previous app session data.
Test Data: Routes: /profile, /foods, /diary day, weekly summary
Steps: 1. Visit each data page while backend is unreachable; 2. Observe state; 3. Check for stale/cached data wording.
Expected Result: Each page shows its exact or general Arabic read-failure message; no cached personal nutrition data is presented as source of truth.
Platform / Viewport: Desktop; mobile; PWA shell if present
Validation Rule(s): Online-only v1 requires fresh backend data for personal nutrition.
Expected Error Message: تعذر تحميل البيانات. تحقق من الاتصال وحاول مرة أخرى.

User Story Title: Handle API Write Failures Without Local Persistence
Test Case Title: Failed writes are never queued offline
Test Case Description: Verify Profile, Food, Diary create/edit/delete failures do not create pending sync state or local write queue.
Preconditions: Backend write APIs unavailable.
Test Data: Profile update; Food create; Diary create; Diary delete
Steps: 1. Attempt each write while offline or API down; 2. Inspect UI for saved-locally/pending-sync messages; 3. Reload after network restored.
Expected Result: Each write fails with Arabic error, preserves input where applicable, and no pending sync or queued write is shown or replayed automatically.
Platform / Viewport: Desktop Chrome; Android Chrome; iPhone Safari PWA
Validation Rule(s): No offline write queue; no saved locally state; save only after successful API response.
Expected Error Message: تعذر الاتصال بالخادم. لم يتم حفظ التغييرات.
Notes / Open Questions: Existing IndexedDB/sync code should be treated as implementation alignment, not v1 behavior.

Test Case Title: Map 401, 404, 422, network, and 5xx errors
Test Case Description: Verify shared UI behavior for common API failure classes.
Preconditions: Backend/API can simulate status codes.
Test Data: 401; 404; 422; timeout/network; 500
Steps: 1. Trigger each status from read and write context where applicable; 2. Observe field/form/page errors.
Expected Result: 401 shows access/session error; 404 shows not found/refresh message; 422 maps field errors where possible; network/timeout shows connection error; 5xx shows server error.
Validation Rule(s): Use approved online-only API error mapping.
Expected Error Message: تعذر الوصول. تحقق من صلاحية الدخول.; العنصر غير موجود. حدّث الصفحة وحاول مرة أخرى.; راجع الحقول المظللة ثم حاول مرة أخرى.; تعذر الاتصال بالخادم. لم يتم حفظ التغييرات.; حدث خطأ في الخادم. حاول مرة أخرى.

Test Case Title: 422 known field errors appear at field level
Test Case Description: Verify server validation errors are displayed near matching fields and preserve submitted input.
Preconditions: Form submit receives 422 with field error details.
Test Data: Food fiber_g greater than carb_g from API
Steps: 1. Submit invalid form; 2. Inspect field error placement; 3. Verify input values remain visible.
Expected Result: Known field validation errors appear next to the related fields; form-level generic message is used only for unmapped validation errors.
Validation Rule(s): 422 Validation Error maps to field-level errors where possible.
Expected Error Message: راجع الحقول المظللة ثم حاول مرة أخرى.

User Story Title: Prevent Duplicate Submits and Support Retry
Test Case Title: Prevent repeated submit during slow API request
Test Case Description: Verify duplicate submits do not create duplicate records or duplicate API mutations.
Preconditions: API response is intentionally slow.
Test Data: Food create; Diary create; Profile update
Steps: 1. Fill a valid form; 2. Double-click submit or tap repeatedly; 3. Inspect network/API records and UI.
Expected Result: Only one request is accepted while pending; submit control shows pending state; duplicate attempt shows or maintains pending indication.
Validation Rule(s): Repeated submit during slow API response must be blocked.
Expected Error Message: الطلب قيد المعالجة. انتظر حتى يكتمل.

User Story Title: Prevent Duplicate Submits and Support Retry
Test Case Title: Retry succeeds after failed request without duplicating data
Test Case Description: Verify user can retry a failed write after fixing network and the original failed request is not replayed automatically.
Preconditions: Initial write fails; network later restored.
Test Data: Valid Food create or Diary create input
Steps: 1. Submit valid form while API fails; 2. Confirm error; 3. Restore API; 4. Click Retry or submit again once; 5. Inspect resulting records.
Expected Result: Only the explicit retry creates/updates one record; no automatic queued replay occurs; UI clears error after success.
Validation Rule(s): Failed writes preserve input and require explicit successful retry.
Expected Error Message: تعذر الاتصال بالخادم. لم يتم حفظ التغييرات.

Test Case Title: Verify offline/sync artifacts are excluded from v1 behavior
Test Case Description: Verify v1 does not expose or require offline mutation queue, pending sync, conflict handling, or stale-cache behavior.
Preconditions: BA package and application UI are available; any existing sync/offline code is treated as implementation alignment only.
Test Data: UI labels: saved locally, will sync later, pending sync, syncing, conflict; routes/components: SyncStatus, offline page, sync API.
Steps: 1. Inspect app navigation and visible pages for pending sync or saved-locally states; 2. Inspect QA/BA v1 flows for any requirement to pass by syncing later; 3. Attempt a failed write and check visible messages; 4. Confirm no v1 manual test requires conflict resolution or sync replay.
Expected Result: No v1 user-facing flow treats offline cache, pending sync, queued writes, conflict handling, or stale cache as accepted behavior; failed writes show online error and remain unsaved.
Validation Rule(s): Offline-first behavior is out of v1 scope.

Test Case Title: Icon buttons have accessible names
Test Case Description: Verify icon-only actions such as edit, delete, search, back, and close have accessible names in Arabic or clear localized text.
Preconditions: Relevant pages have action buttons.
Test Data: Foods edit/delete; Diary delete; dialog close
Steps: 1. Use accessibility inspector or Testing Library queries; 2. Locate icon buttons by accessible name; 3. Verify screen reader text is meaningful.
Expected Result: All icon-only controls expose meaningful accessible names and are keyboard reachable.
Platform / Viewport: Desktop; mobile screen reader where possible
Validation Rule(s): Interactive controls require accessible names.
Notes / Open Questions: Exact Arabic accessible labels may require design review.

Test Case Title: Field errors are programmatically associated
Test Case Description: Verify validation errors set aria-invalid and are associated through aria-describedby or equivalent.
Preconditions: Forms available.
Test Data: Food required field error; Profile birth date error; Diary quantity error
Steps: 1. Trigger field validation errors; 2. Inspect input accessibility attributes; 3. Navigate with keyboard/screen reader.
Expected Result: Invalid fields are announced with their specific error message and focus moves to first invalid field on submit.
Platform / Viewport: Desktop; mobile screen reader where possible
Validation Rule(s): Field-level errors must be accessible and focus first invalid field.

Test Case Title: Validate optional nutrient error visibility in collapsed or visible section
Test Case Description: Verify optional/collapsible nutrient sections do not hide invalid field errors after submit.
Preconditions: Food form is available; optional nutrient fields are either inside a collapsible section or always visible.
Test Data: Optional detail field sodium_mg above max inside collapsed section
Steps: 1. If optional nutrient fields are collapsible, collapse the section; 2. Enter sodium_mg above 10000 or another invalid optional nutrient value; 3. Submit the form; 4. If the fields are not collapsible, submit with the invalid visible value.
Expected Result: If a collapsed optional section contains the first invalid field, it opens before focus moves to that field; if no collapsible section exists, the invalid optional field and its error are already visible and focused or referenced.
Validation Rule(s): Hidden validation errors must become visible and accessible.
Notes / Open Questions: Executable for both allowed UI designs; no longer depends on an unconfirmed collapsible section.

Test Case Title: Confirmation dialogs are keyboard accessible and restore focus
Test Case Description: Verify Food archive and Diary delete dialogs support keyboard navigation and focus management.
Preconditions: Food and diary entries exist.
Test Data: Food archive dialog; diary delete dialog
Steps: 1. Open dialog by keyboard; 2. Tab through controls; 3. Press Escape; 4. Reopen and confirm; 5. Observe focus after close.
Expected Result: Focus is trapped inside dialog while open, Escape/Cancel closes safely, Confirm is reachable, and focus returns to a safe triggering area after close.
Validation Rule(s): Delete/archive confirmation dialogs must be keyboard accessible.

Test Case Title: Async loading and error states use status or live regions
Test Case Description: Verify loading, success, and error status messages are available to assistive technology.
Preconditions: Pages with async reads/writes available.
Test Data: Foods loading; write error; no results
Steps: 1. Trigger Foods loading state; 2. Trigger search no-results; 3. Trigger a write network error; 4. Inspect accessibility tree for role=status, aria-live=polite, aria-live=assertive, or equivalent announced status region; 5. Verify the status text is not color-only.
Expected Result: Loading, no-results, success, and error changes are exposed through role=status, aria-live, or equivalent accessible announcement pattern and remain visible on screen.
Platform / Viewport: Desktop screen reader; mobile screen reader
Validation Rule(s): Important async states should be accessible.
Expected Error Message: تعذر الاتصال بالخادم. لم يتم حفظ التغييرات.

User Story Title: Use the App on Supported Mobile and Desktop Viewports
Test Case Title: No horizontal scrolling on required viewports
Test Case Description: Verify key pages fit at required widths with Arabic RTL content.
Preconditions: App reachable; seeded data includes long food names and mixed text.
Test Data: Viewports 360, 390, 430, 768, desktop
Steps: 1. Open Diary, Foods, Food form, Profile; 2. Resize to each required viewport; 3. Check for horizontal scrolling or content overlap.
Expected Result: No horizontal scrolling, overlapped actions, or clipped critical content on required viewports.
Validation Rule(s): Required viewport matrix must be supported.

User Story Title: Use the App on Supported Mobile and Desktop Viewports
Test Case Title: Touch targets and keyboard-safe form actions meet mobile thresholds
Test Case Description: Verify form inputs and action buttons remain usable on mobile when virtual keyboard is open.
Preconditions: Mobile browser or emulation available.
Test Data: Food form numeric fields; Diary quantity; Profile fields
Steps: 1. Open Profile, Food form, and Diary quantity form at 390px; 2. Measure primary action, cancel, edit, delete, and segmented-control touch targets; 3. Focus each text/date/number input; 4. With the virtual keyboard open, attempt to reach submit and cancel actions by scrolling if needed.
Expected Result: Interactive controls are at least 44x44 CSS px or have equivalent spacing, keyboard does not permanently cover submit/cancel actions, and the page can scroll to critical actions without horizontal scrolling.
Platform / Viewport: iPhone Safari latest two; Android Chrome latest two
Validation Rule(s): Keyboard must not hide critical form actions; touch targets must be usable.

User Story Title: Use the App on Supported Mobile and Desktop Viewports
Test Case Title: Mixed Arabic and English text preserves order without overlap
Test Case Description: Verify mixed Arabic/English names, numbers, and units render correctly in RTL layouts.
Preconditions: Seeded food names include mixed text.
Test Data: Food name: Greek Yogurt زبادي يوناني 170g Protein+
Steps: 1. Open Foods list at 360px with mixed Arabic/English names and numeric units; 2. Inspect food cards, details, and Diary entries; 3. Verify horizontal scroll is absent; 4. Verify numbers and units remain visually attached to the intended text.
Expected Result: Mixed Arabic/English text has no overlap, no horizontal scroll, preserved number/unit order, and readable control alignment in RTL.
Validation Rule(s): Arabic RTL and mixed Arabic/English text must remain readable.

User Story Title: Use the App on Supported Mobile and Desktop Viewports
Test Case Title: Long food names truncate in lists and show full in details
Test Case Description: Verify long food names do not break mobile layout while remaining fully available in details/edit.
Preconditions: Food with long mixed Arabic/English name exists.
Test Data: Very long food name over 100 characters
Steps: 1. Open Foods list/card at 360px; 2. Inspect name display; 3. Open details/edit view.
Expected Result: List/card shows up to two lines with ellipsis and no horizontal scroll; details/edit show full name.
Validation Rule(s): Food list truncates long names to 2 lines; detail/edit show full name.

User Story Title: Cover Core v1 Behavior With Tests
Test Case Title: Verify CSV traceability and executable readiness
Test Case Description: Verify the test-case package itself maps finalized BA stories, feature IDs, decisions, validation rules, and QA focus areas before execution.
Preconditions: Current BA package, final QA audit, test-case CSV, and update summary are available.
Test Data: This CSV and BA user stories
Steps: 1. Count BA user stories and compare against unique CSV User Story IDs; 2. Verify each row has Test Case ID, Feature ID, feature name, user story ID, scenario type, steps, expected result, priority, test level, and automation suitability; 3. Verify critical BA decisions D-001 through D-023 are referenced across the suite; 4. Record any remaining manual-only or risk-based cases.
Expected Result: All 40 user stories are covered, all rows have required traceability fields, all D-001 through D-023 decisions have at least one related test, and manual/risk cases are explicitly labeled.
Validation Rule(s): Every approved story should be testable.
Notes / Open Questions: Governance/control test; not an application behavior test, but executable as a QA readiness checklist.

Test Case Title: User-entered text is escaped or rejected and never executed
Test Case Description: Verify Food text inputs and rendered user content cannot execute HTML or script and do not corrupt layout.
Preconditions: Food name or serving label accepts text.
Test Data: name ; serving_label
Steps: 1. Attempt to create or update Food name and serving_label using HTML/script-like strings; 2. If validation rejects the input, verify field/form error and no save; 3. If validation allows the literal text, open Foods list, detail, and Diary entry surfaces; 4. Observe browser console and UI.
Expected Result: HTML/script-like text is either rejected by validation or rendered as inert escaped text; no script executes, no markup is interpreted, and no layout or personal data exposure occurs.
Validation Rule(s): User content must not execute as HTML/script.
Source / Evidence: docs/ba/07_USER_STORIES.md US-AUTH-PERM-001; docs/ba/04_FIELD_DICTIONARY.md accepted characters partly defined
Notes / Open Questions: BA forbids HTML/script rendered markup; exact accepted character policy can be tightened later.

Test Case Title: Large personal food list meets QA usability benchmark
Test Case Description: Risk-based performance test for a large personal-use catalog; benchmark is a QA planning target, not a BA product SLA.
Preconditions: Backend seeded with many active foods.
Test Data: 500 active foods with Arabic and English names, 50 archived foods, and at least 20 matching a common search term.
Steps: 1. Seed 500 active foods and 50 archived foods; 2. Open Foods page in Desktop Chrome and Android Chrome at 390px; 3. Measure time until list is interactive; 4. Enter a search term and measure time until results update; 5. Scroll through the list.
Expected Result: For QA benchmark, initial list becomes usable within 2 seconds on desktop and 3 seconds on Android Chrome; search updates within 500 ms after debounce or documented UI response; scrolling remains stable with no input blocking.
Validation Rule(s): No explicit performance SLA exists; test as risk-based scenario.
Source / Evidence: docs/ba/07_USER_STORIES.md US-FOOD-HAPPY-001; user requested performance-risk scenarios
Notes / Open Questions: Recommended QA Risk. If product wants a formal SLA, add it to BA before release gating.

Test Case Title: Offline page does not offer personal nutrition reads or writes
Test Case Description: Verify any offline page or offline shell state is informational only and does not expose offline Profile, Foods, or Diary data as current.
Preconditions: PWA shell/offline page exists if retained.
Test Data: Offline network state
Steps: 1. Load app online; 2. Go offline; 3. Navigate to the offline page or reload into the offline shell; 4. Inspect available actions and copy; 5. Try to access Profile, Foods, or Diary write actions if visible.
Expected Result: Offline UI shows connection problem or shell-only information, does not show personal nutrition data as current, and does not expose save/edit/delete actions that imply local persistence or later sync.
Validation Rule(s): Offline/cached personal data is Future Scope only.
Expected Error Message: تعذر تحميل البيانات. تحقق من الاتصال وحاول مرة أخرى.

User Story Title: Use Single Profile Scope in v1
Test Case Title: Verify Profile reset/delete controls are not available in v1
Test Case Description: Verify v1 supports editing the existing Profile only and does not expose reset or delete behavior.
Preconditions: Application is reachable; Profile page and protected API routes are available.
Test Data: Profile page controls; API route list if available.
Steps: 1. Open Profile page; 2. Inspect visible actions and menus; 3. Try to find reset/delete profile controls; 4. Review protected Profile API route list or API docs if available.
Expected Result: No reset/delete Profile UI is visible; no v1 reset/delete Profile API is required or exposed for normal use; user can correct data only by editing existing fields.
Validation Rule(s): Profile reset/delete is out of scope for v1.
Notes / Open Questions: This is an absence/scope test, not a delete/reset flow test.

Test Case Title: Verify empty-token auth configuration behavior
Test Case Description: Verify the documented exception that protected routes require bearer token unless the configured token is intentionally empty.
Preconditions: QA environment can be started with API token empty; protected endpoint is available.
Test Data: Configuration: API token empty; request without Authorization header.
Steps: 1. Start backend in QA configuration with API token intentionally empty; 2. Send protected Profile, Food, or Diary API request without Authorization header; 3. Compare behavior with non-empty token configuration test.
Expected Result: When token is empty by configuration, request is allowed according to the documented personal-use auth rule; when token is non-empty, missing token is rejected by TC-AUTH-002.
Validation Rule(s): Protected APIs require bearer token unless configured token is empty.
Notes / Open Questions: Run only in isolated QA configuration; never disable auth in shared environments.

Test Case Title: Reject missing required Profile fields
Test Case Description: Verify required Profile fields show Arabic field-level errors and block saving.
Preconditions: Profile form is open; existing values can be cleared or API request can submit missing fields.
Test Data: Missing sex, birth_date, height_cm, weight_kg, activity_level, goal, protein_per_kg, fat_pct.
Steps: 1. Clear all required Profile inputs where UI allows; 2. Submit; 3. For select defaults, send API payload with missing fields if UI cannot clear them; 4. Inspect errors.
Expected Result: Save is blocked or API returns 422; each missing required field has field-level Arabic required error; focus moves to the first invalid field; no local save or queue occurs.
Field(s): sex; birth_date; height_cm; weight_kg; activity_level; goal; protein_per_kg; fat_pct
Validation Rule(s): Required Profile fields cannot be empty.
Notes / Open Questions: If UI defaults prevent empty select state, API validation still must be tested.

Test Case Title: Reject invalid Profile enum values
Test Case Description: Verify Profile select fields accept only documented enum values.
Preconditions: Profile API is available; UI select controls are available.
Test Data: sex=other; activity_level=extreme; goal=recomp.
Steps: 1. Attempt to submit invalid enum values through API; 2. If UI can be manipulated, inject invalid select values and submit; 3. Observe field errors.
Expected Result: Invalid enum values are rejected with invalid select error or 422 mapped to the field; no Profile update is saved locally or remotely.
Validation Rule(s): Allowed values: sex male/female; activity_level sedentary/light/moderate/active/very_active; goal cut/maintain/bulk.
Notes / Open Questions: UI may prevent invalid options; API test is mandatory.

Test Case Title: Verify Diary target display after Profile save
Test Case Description: Verify saved Profile targets are visible on Diary daily and weekly surfaces.
Preconditions: Valid Profile has been saved successfully; Diary page is reachable.
Test Data: Saved profile: valid height, weight, age, activity, goal, protein_per_kg, fat_pct.
Steps: 1. Save a valid Profile; 2. Navigate to Diary day view; 3. Inspect target strip or target comparison; 4. Navigate weekly summary; 5. Compare displayed targets with Profile target preview values.
Expected Result: Diary day and weekly summary show target calories and macros derived from the saved Profile; values update after successful Profile save and page refresh.
Validation Rule(s): Target display uses saved Profile-derived targets.
Notes / Open Questions: Completes explicit F-015 coverage outside Profile preview.

Test Case Title: Reject whitespace-only Food name and serving label
Test Case Description: Verify trim rules prevent required Food text fields from passing with spaces only.
Preconditions: Food create/edit form is open.
Test Data: name spaces only; serving_label tabs/spaces only.
Steps: 1. Open add Food form; 2. Enter whitespace-only name and valid other fields; 3. Submit; 4. Enter valid name and whitespace-only serving_label; 5. Submit.
Expected Result: Whitespace-only name or serving_label is treated as empty after trim and rejected with required Arabic error; no Food is saved.
Validation Rule(s): Trim leading/trailing whitespace; reject empty after trim.
Notes / Open Questions: Also protects duplicate normalization from blank keys.

Test Case Title: Reject or safely handle too-long Food name and serving label
Test Case Description: Verify text max lengths and mobile layout behavior for oversized Food identity fields.
Preconditions: Food create/edit form is open; mobile viewport available.
Test Data: name 121 characters; serving_label 81 characters; mixed Arabic/English long text.
Steps: 1. Enter name with 121 characters and otherwise valid fields; 2. Submit; 3. Enter valid name and serving_label with 81 characters; 4. Submit; 5. At 360px, inspect any validation or rendered text.
Expected Result: Values over max are rejected with field-level Arabic error and no save; if viewing existing long valid names, list/card truncation rules prevent horizontal scroll.
Validation Rule(s): name max 120 chars; serving_label max 80 chars; long text must not break mobile layout.
Notes / Open Questions: Uses generic above-maximum message defined in BA global rules.

Test Case Title: Block active duplicate Arabic Food after trimming and collapsing spaces
Test Case Description: Verify Arabic duplicate normalization trims and collapses repeated spaces for active foods.
Preconditions: Active Food exists with Arabic name and serving label.
Test Data: Existing active: name رز أبيض, serving_label طبق كبير, serving_grams 250; New: name spaces around رز  أبيض, serving_label طبق   كبير, serving_grams 250.
Steps: 1. Create or seed the existing active Arabic Food; 2. Open add Food form; 3. Enter duplicate Arabic name and serving label with extra spaces; 4. Submit.
Expected Result: Save is blocked with duplicate active food message; no second active Food is created.
Validation Rule(s): Arabic normalization trims and collapses whitespace; active duplicate key is name + serving_label + serving_grams.
Expected Error Message: هذا الطعام موجود مسبقًا بنفس الحصة.

Test Case Title: Validate optional nutrient ranges
Test Case Description: Verify optional nutrient fields are allowed blank, but invalid entered values are rejected.
Preconditions: Food form is open.
Test Data: saturated_fat_g -1/301; trans_fat_g -1/301; total_sugars_g -1/301; added_sugar_g -1/301; sodium_mg -1/10001; cholesterol_mg -1/2001.
Steps: 1. Fill required Food fields validly; 2. For each optional nutrient, enter below-min and submit; 3. Enter above-max and submit; 4. Leave optional fields blank and submit valid food.
Expected Result: Entered optional values outside range show field-level Arabic errors; blank optional values are accepted as null/unknown; zero is accepted as real zero.
Field(s): saturated_fat_g; trans_fat_g; total_sugars_g; added_sugar_g; sodium_mg; cholesterol_mg
Validation Rule(s): Optional nutrients blank allowed; if entered, values must be within v1 min/max ranges.
Expected Error Message: القيمة أقل من الحد المسموح.; القيمة أعلى من الحد المسموح.
Notes / Open Questions: Can be automated as parameterized validation tests.

User Story Title: Prevent Duplicate Submits and Support Retry
Test Case Title: Prevent repeated confirm on Food archive dialog
Test Case Description: Verify repeated confirm clicks during a slow archive request send exactly one archive API request.
Preconditions: Active Food exists; archive API response can be delayed.
Test Data: Food id A; slow archive response; repeated Enter/click confirm.
Steps: 1. Open Food archive confirmation dialog; 2. Confirm archive and immediately click/tap confirm repeatedly or press Enter repeatedly; 3. Inspect network/API request count; 4. Observe pending state.
Expected Result: Only one archive request is sent; confirm action is disabled or pending after first submit; duplicate submit message or pending state is shown; Food archives only after API success.
Validation Rule(s): Pending delete/archive confirmation blocks repeated submit and sends exactly one request.
Expected Error Message: الطلب قيد المعالجة. انتظر حتى يكتمل.

Test Case Title: Validate gram quantity lower and upper bounds
Test Case Description: Verify gram-mode quantity accepts 1-5000 grams and rejects values outside the range.
Preconditions: Active Food has serving_grams; Diary add/edit gram mode is available.
Test Data: quantity 0; 0.5; 1; 5000; 5001; invalid text abc.
Steps: 1. Select food with serving_grams; 2. Choose gram mode; 3. Submit each below-min value; 4. Submit above-max value; 5. Submit valid boundary values 1 and 5000; 6. Repeat in edit mode for a gram entry.
Expected Result: Below-min, above-max, and non-numeric gram quantities are rejected with Arabic field errors; 1 and 5000 grams are accepted when other fields are valid.
Validation Rule(s): Gram quantity range is 1-5000; invalid numbers rejected.
Expected Error Message: أدخل رقمًا صحيحًا.; القيمة أقل من الحد المسموح.; القيمة أعلى من الحد المسموح.

Test Case Title: Reject missing required Diary fields and invalid log_mode
Test Case Description: Verify Diary create API/UI rejects missing required fields and unsupported logging mode.
Preconditions: Diary create form/API is available.
Test Data: Missing entry_date; missing food_id; missing log_mode; log_mode ounces; missing quantity.
Steps: 1. Submit Diary create payload missing entry_date; 2. Submit missing food_id; 3. Submit missing log_mode; 4. Submit log_mode=ounces; 5. Submit missing quantity; 6. Observe field errors.
Expected Result: Each missing required field is rejected with required Arabic error; unsupported log_mode is rejected with invalid select error; no Diary entry is saved or queued.
Validation Rule(s): entry_date, food_id, log_mode, and quantity are required; log_mode allowed values are servings and grams.
Expected Error Message: هذا الحقل مطلوب.; اختر قيمة صحيحة.
Notes / Open Questions: UI may default log_mode; API validation remains required.

User Story Title: Handle Stale Food During Edit, Archive, or Diary Logging
Test Case Title: Reject Diary submit when selected Food is archived after selection
Test Case Description: Verify Diary logging cannot save using a Food that becomes archived after it was selected but before submit.
Preconditions: Diary add form is open with selected active Food; another session or API can archive the Food before submit.
Test Data: Selected Food id A; quantity valid; log_mode servings or grams.
Steps: 1. Select active Food in Diary add form; 2. Archive the same Food from another client/API; 3. Submit Diary entry; 4. Observe error and Diary list.
Expected Result: Diary entry is not created; stale Food Arabic error is shown; no local diary entry or queued mutation is created; user must refresh active Foods before retry.
Validation Rule(s): Selected Food must still be active at submit time.
Expected Error Message: هذا الطعام لم يعد متاحًا. حدّث القائمة وحاول مرة أخرى.
Notes / Open Questions: Requires deterministic stale fixture or two-client test setup.

User Story Title: Prevent Duplicate Submits and Support Retry
Test Case Title: Prevent repeated confirm on Diary delete dialog
Test Case Description: Verify repeated confirm clicks during a slow Diary delete request send exactly one delete API request.
Preconditions: Existing Diary entry; delete API response can be delayed.
Test Data: Entry id A; repeated confirm click/tap/Enter.
Steps: 1. Open Diary delete confirmation dialog; 2. Confirm delete and immediately click/tap confirm repeatedly or press Enter repeatedly; 3. Inspect network/API request count; 4. Observe pending state and final totals.
Expected Result: Only one delete request is sent; confirm action is disabled or pending after first submit; entry and totals update only after successful response.
Validation Rule(s): Pending delete confirmation blocks repeated submit and sends exactly one request.
Expected Error Message: الطلب قيد المعالجة. انتظر حتى يكتمل.

User Story Title: Use the App on Supported Mobile and Desktop Viewports
Test Case Title: Verify safe-area and bottom navigation do not overlap critical actions
Test Case Description: Verify mobile layout respects safe areas and persistent navigation does not cover form actions or cards.
Preconditions: Mobile browser/device or viewport emulator supports safe-area simulation.
Test Data: Viewports 360, 390, 430; pages: Diary, Foods, Food form, Profile; PWA standalone if available.
Steps: 1. Open each page at 360, 390, and 430px; 2. If bottom navigation exists, inspect content and submit buttons near the bottom; 3. Focus inputs to open keyboard; 4. In standalone/PWA mode if available, inspect top and bottom safe areas.
Expected Result: No critical action, validation error, or card action is hidden behind browser chrome, safe area, keyboard, or bottom navigation; user can scroll to submit/cancel controls.
Field(s): Layout; navigation; submit buttons; validation errors
Validation Rule(s): Required mobile matrix has no overlap and no horizontal scrolling.

Test Case Title: Verify RTL icon direction, error direction, focus visibility, and contrast
Test Case Description: Verify Arabic RTL accessibility basics beyond control labels and dialog behavior.
Preconditions: App pages and forms are available with Arabic RTL content.
Test Data: Navigation icons; back/close/delete icons; field errors; focusable controls; high-contrast check.
Steps: 1. Navigate app by keyboard in RTL layout; 2. Trigger Arabic field errors; 3. Inspect icon direction for navigation/back/close actions; 4. Verify visible focus indicator on links, buttons, inputs, and dialogs; 5. Check text/error contrast against WCAG AA using tooling.
Expected Result: Directional icons match RTL expectations, Arabic error text direction is readable, focus is visible on every interactive control, and text/error contrast meets WCAG AA or documented design threshold.
Field(s): Icons; error text; focus states; color contrast
Validation Rule(s): Accessible controls, error readability, RTL polish, and visible focus are required.
Notes / Open Questions: Some visual checks require manual or visual-regression tooling.
